positive: Minimalist geometric depiction of a stylized, bioluminescent forest scene. A central, serene grouping of abstract trees with clean, defined silhouettes, rendered in deep sapphire blue and emerald green, contrasting sharply against a muted off-white background. The lighting is ethereal and source-free, suggesting twilight or deep space, emphasizing high contrast and crisp line work. Incorporate subtle, abstract crystalline structures scattered among the foliage to add visual complexity. Clean vector style, suitable for repeat pattern scaling, highly legible, symmetrical composition. Art Deco influence meets contemporary graphic design.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grainy, jpeg artifacts, messy, watercolor, realistic photo
